nasb.text: Now the sons of Reuben, Israel’s firstborn, their genealogical registration by their families, by their fathers’ households, according to the number of names, head by head, every male from twenty years old and upward, whoever was able to go out to war,

esv.text: The people of Reuben, Israel’s firstborn, their generations, by their clans, by their fathers’ houses, according to the number of names, head by head, every male from twenty years old and upward, all who were able to go to war:

cnv.text: 以色列的長子，流本子孫的後代，照著宗族、父家，根據人名數目，按著人口，二十歲及以上，能出去打仗的男丁，都登記了；
